---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the starter structure, templates, or baseline workflow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or Opportunity

What is missing or awkward today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the improvement.

## Scope

- Starter template content
- Repo structure
- Lint or editor config
- Dev Spaces integration guidance
- Build or manifest guidance

## Why This Belongs in the Starter

Explain why this should be generic and reusable across teams.
